retrieved_result: Average Temperatures for Georgia in October Average Temperatures for Georgia in October Average temperatures for October at cities, towns, and parks throughout Georgia are listed below in degrees Fahrenheit and Celsius. The tables give the normals for maximum and minimum temperatures based on weather data collected from 1981 to 2010 by the US
Decision_Reason: The page discusses weather data (temperatures in Georgia) and are unrelated to TikTok trends.
